ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Continued To Mar-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom: Scott Holman, Esq. for Kathryn M. Taylor (Petitioner).

The Court stated that there were open examiner's notes. Mr. Holman provided a brief update stating that they hope to have an amended petition on file soon, that the corrected inventory and appraisal was filed, and that they need to file the final inventory and appraisal. The Court inquired if the filing will address all of the examiner's notes. Mr. Holman confirmed that it would. Mr. Holman addressed the reason for the delay stating that they had to confirm some assets and that the process took some time. Mr. Holman confirmed for the Court that he would be filing an amendment to the petition. The Court stated that if the amendment is on file that the matter may go off calendar. The Court noted that if the amendment is not on file that it is asking counsel to file a petition for approval of further report on status of the administration.

At the conclusion of comments, the matter is continued to March 1, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.

The Order to Appear is taken off calendar. The Status Hearing is continued to Jan-09-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-24-2021 Continued To Oct-12-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Scott Holman appeared by telephone for Kathryn Taylor (Executor).

Mr. Holman stated that he believes the notice of hearing was properly submitted, that he wasn't aware that fees had not been paid and asked how to pay said fees. The Court instructed Mr. Holman to contact the Clerk's office and informed him that he needs to amend the current petition to make it a petition for final distribution, that he will need to pay an additional fee of $235.00 to amend the petition and that once he files the amended petition, he will need to re-notice the petition. The Petition to Approve Status of Administration is continued to October 12, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
